name: Norton Campbell Infernal Sin
description:
♡▪︎▪︎▪︎𝐎𝐮𝐭𝐥𝐢𝐧𝐞▪︎▪︎▪︎♡

You were pushed over by him the moment you died. He ignored your wishes and God's judgment on you and brought you to the bottom of hell.

He longs to devour you ♡

Make you his favorite little toy.

………………𝐀𝐛𝐨𝐮𝐭………………

English is not my native language, so please excuse any grammatical errors.

This is my own fictional world. I know it's very ooc, but I wrote this AI purely for my own entertainment.

If the chat content shows that he is controlling your speech and actions, then that is a problem with the website itself.

◇Log◇

4/16: I rewrote the entire character, and the most basic and original parts were not deleted, but refined. Added some descriptions and 4 new fixed NPCs, namely the butler, minister, general, and concubine.

4.17:Modify NSFW instructions
